TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sslalu' gaga' na sslalu' Tayal hya' ga, syun naha' glaing lalu' na laqi' hru 'buzyan naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' tay suruw, gi yasa qu blaq slpuw musa' tay yatux.
S.PHON: s~…ēs~…ēlalu Ē …£a…£a Ē na s~…ēs~…ēlalu Ē tajal ńßja Ē …£a, s~…ējun nańßa Ē …£laiŇč lalu Ē na laqi Ē ńßru Ēő≤uzjan nańßa Ē lalu Ē na jaő≤a Ē nańßa Ē taj s~…ēuruw, …£i jas~…ēa qu ő≤laq s~…ēlpuw mus~…ēa Ē taj jatux.
S.FORM: sslalu' gaga' na sslalu' Tayal hya' ga, syun naha' glaing lalu' na laqi' hru 'buzyan naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' tay suruw, gi yasa qu blaq slpuw musa' tay yatux.
S.PHON: s~…ēs~…ēlalu Ē …£a…£a Ē na s~…ēs~…ēlalu Ē tajal ńßja Ē …£a, s~…ējun nańßa Ē …£laiŇč lalu Ē na laqi Ē ńßru Ēő≤uzjan nańßa Ē lalu Ē na jaő≤a Ē nańßa Ē taj s~…ēuruw, …£i jas~…ēa qu ő≤laq s~…ēlpuw mus~…ēa Ē taj jatux.
